'''鈭歸-f-ng''' ('''wafanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knock|knock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knock|knock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-f-ng
|-
! Lemma
| wafanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wafangithi|wafangithi]] || [[word:wafangiji|wafangiji]] || [[word:wafangishi|wafangishi]] || [[word:wafangi|wafangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafanguthuth|wafanguthuth]] || [[word:wafangujuj|wafangujuj]] || [[word:wafangushush|wafangushush]] || [[word:wafang|wafang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafanguthu|wafanguthu]] || [[word:wafanguju|wafanguju]] || [[word:wafangushu|wafangushu]] || [[word:wafangu|wafangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafangufuth|wafangufuth]] || [[word:wafangufuj|wafangufuj]] || [[word:wafangufush|wafangufush]] || [[word:wafanguf|wafanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wafangethe|wafangethe]] || [[word:wafangeje|wafangeje]] || [[word:wafangeshe|wafangeshe]] || [[word:wafange|wafange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafangothoth|wafangothoth]] || [[word:wafangojoj|wafangojoj]] || [[word:wafangoshosh|wafangoshosh]] || [[word:wafang|wafang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafangotho|wafangotho]] || [[word:wafangojo|wafangojo]] || [[word:wafangosho|wafangosho]] || [[word:wafango|wafango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafangofoth|wafangofoth]] || [[word:wafangofoj|wafangofoj]] || [[word:wafangofosh|wafangofosh]] || [[word:wafangof|wafangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wafang忙th忙|wafang忙th忙]] || [[word:wafang忙j忙|wafang忙j忙]] || [[word:wafang忙sh忙|wafang忙sh忙]] || [[word:wafang忙|wafang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafangathath|wafangathath]] || [[word:wafangajaj|wafangajaj]] || [[word:wafangashash|wafangashash]] || [[word:wafang|wafang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafangatha|wafangatha]] || [[word:wafangaja|wafangaja]] || [[word:wafangasha|wafangasha]] || [[word:wafanga|wafanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafangafath|wafangafath]] || [[word:wafangafaj|wafangafaj]] || [[word:wafangafash|wafangafash]] || [[word:wafangaf|wafangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wafangasha|wafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowafangasha|gowafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwafangasha|gokiwafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafangn眉sha|wafangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowafangnkn眉sha|gowafangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafangn眉sha|gokiwafangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafangsh毛sha|wafangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafangnksh毛sha|gowafangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafangsh毛sha|gokiwafangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafangrosha|wafangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafangnkrosha|gowafangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafangrosha|gokiwafangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wafangmusha|wafangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafangnkmusha|gowafangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafangmusha|gokiwafangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wafangsherasha|wafangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowafangnksherasha|gowafangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwafangsherasha|gokiwafangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wafangasha|wafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowafangnkngasha|gowafangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwafangasha|gokiwafangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wafangyasha|wafangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowafangnkyasha|gowafangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwafangyasha|gokiwafangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wafangyamasha|wafangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowafangnkyamasha|gowafangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwafangyamasha|gokiwafangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wafangn眉sh毛sha|wafangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowafangnkn眉sh毛sha|gowafangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwafangn眉sh毛sha|gokiwafangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafangn眉rosha|wafangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafangnkn眉rosha|gowafangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafangn眉rosha|gokiwafangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafangn眉musha|wafangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafangnkn眉musha|gowafangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafangn眉musha|gokiwafangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wafangsh毛n眉sha|wafangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowafangnksh毛n眉sha|gowafangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafangsh毛n眉sha|gokiwafangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafangsh毛rosha|wafangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafangnksh毛rosha|gowafangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafangsh毛rosha|gokiwafangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafangsh毛musha|wafangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafangnksh毛musha|gowafangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafangsh毛musha|gokiwafangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wafangron眉sha|wafangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowafangnkron眉sha|gowafangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafangron眉sha|gokiwafangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wafangrosh毛sha|wafangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowafangnkrosh毛sha|gowafangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwafangrosh毛sha|gokiwafangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafangromusha|wafangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafangnkromusha|gowafangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafangromusha|gokiwafangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wafangmun眉sha|wafangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowafangnkmun眉sha|gowafangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwafangmun眉sha|gokiwafangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wafangmush毛sha|wafangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowafangnkmush毛sha|gowafangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwafangmush毛sha|gokiwafangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wafangmurosha|wafangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowafangnkmurosha|gowafangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwafangmurosha|gokiwafangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wafang|wafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:w忙f忙ng|w忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howafang|howafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:how忙f忙ng|how忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowafang|hohowafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohow忙f忙ng|hohow忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉wafang|n眉wafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉w忙f忙ng|n眉w忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉wafang|n眉n眉wafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉w忙f忙ng|n眉n眉w忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂wafang|n茂wafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂w忙f忙ng|n茂w忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂wafang|n茂n茂wafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂w忙f忙ng|n茂n茂w忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwafang|luwafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luw忙f忙ng|luw忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwafang|luluwafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluw忙f忙ng|luluw忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwafang|liwafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liw忙f忙ng|liw忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwafang|liliwafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliw忙f忙ng|liliw忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowafang|kowafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kow忙f忙ng|kow忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowafang|kokowafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokow忙f忙ng|kokow忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewafang|kewafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kew忙f忙ng|kew忙f忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewafang|kekewafang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekew忙f忙ng|kekew忙f忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
